messages.content: write a short description of the company https://coreledger.net/

CORE Ledger is a leading blockchain technology company that offers innovative solutions for businesses of all sizes. With a focus on transforming the way industries manage and exchange assets, CORE Ledger's platform provides secure and transparent asset digitization, tokenization, and decentralized finance capabilities. By leveraging the power of blockchain, the company enables secure and efficient transactions, eliminating the need for intermediaries and reducing costs. CORE Ledger's versatile and scalable technology is revolutionizing various sectors, including supply chain management, financial services, real estate, and more. With a commitment to driving digital transformation, CORE Ledger is empowering organizations to unlock the full potential of blockchain technology and stay ahead in the ever-evolving digital landscape.

rewrite the phrase using synonyms: 
Mobile application, both iOS and Android versions, for document and data management on the base of blockchain technology.
A mobile app, available on both iOS and Android platforms, designed for the management of documents and data utilizing blockchain technology.
rewrite the phrase using synonyms: The team developed a mobile security app for document and data management on iOS and Android platforms.
The group created a mobile application for the safeguarding of documents and information on both iOS and Android operating systems.

rewrite the text using synonyms: CoreLedger took over the back-end development part of the project and delegated front-end development to Innowise Group thanks to comprehensive technological expertise, individual approach, and experience of working with blockchain technology.

CoreLedger assumed control of the project's back-end development aspect and assigned the responsibility of front-end development to Innowise Group due to their extensive technological proficiency, personalized methodology, and prior experience in dealing with blockchain technology.
rewrite the phrase using synonyms: to build a reliable tool for secure storage and confirmation of documents through a digital signature, with the data being stored on the blockchain.
The objective is to construct a trustworthy instrument for the safekeeping and verification of documents via a digital signature, wherein the data is stored on the blockchain.

rewrite the text using synonyms: As our company was involved in the front-end development, the biggest challenge was the dependence on the team that develops the back-end part of the application. Our deadlines and releases were directly reliant on them. In addition, the same services on the back-end part were used simultaneously by several applications. Each of them had their own release dates and slightly different functionality, which made it difficult to plan and synchronize releases. Despite the challenges described above, we established excellent communication with the client’s team and achieved a high level of synchronization, thus meeting the deadlines and completing project tasks in excellent quality.

Since our organization was engaged in the front-end advancement, the primary obstacle encountered was the reliance on the team responsible for the development of the application's back-end segment. Our timelines and launches were directly contingent on their progress. Moreover, multiple applications concurrently utilized identical services on the back-end, each with distinct release dates and slightly varying functionalities, posing challenges in terms of coordination and release planning. Nevertheless, despite the aforementioned difficulties, we successfully established effective communication with the client's team and attained a commendable level of synchronization. Consequently, we were able to meet the deadlines and accomplish project objectives with exceptional quality.

rewrite the text using synonyms, keep the language clear 

We cooperated with the client from the front-end development side to create an iOS and Android application that provides individuals and businesses with a reliable solution for secure and fast document management.

Collaborating with the client on the front-end development front, our aim was to design an iOS and Android app that offers individuals and businesses a dependable and efficient solution for managing their documents securely.

rewrite the text using synonyms, keep the language clear

The solution has extensive cutting-edge features which make it a breakthrough in the ﬁeld of mobile security. 

The app allows users to securely store, sign, download, and share documents within a blockchain system.

The solution encompasses a broad range of state-of-the-art functionalities, positioning it as a groundbreaking advancement in the realm of mobile security.

The application grants users the ability to securely save, digitally sign, retrieve, and exchange documents within a blockchain framework.

rewrite the text using synonyms: Users can leverage the app’s feature set to quickly create documents, confirm them with a digital signature and share with relevant recipients. Using blockchain technology, the solution helps to legally confirm the ownership of information and data, the right to own textual and digital information at a certain point in time. The application uses a cryptographically secure way to verify the authenticity and origin of the data. The app also allows users to take pictures or upload files and verify them on the blockchain.

App users have the ability to utilize the application’s range of functionalities to swiftly generate documents, validate them with a digital signature, and distribute them to pertinent recipients. Harnessing the power of blockchain technology, this solution aids in legally authenticating information and data ownership, affirming the rights to textual and digital information at specific time points. Employing a cryptographically robust approach, the application assures the validity and source of the data. Additionally, users can capture images or upload files, subsequently verifying them within the blockchain.

rewrite the text using synonyms:

CoreLedger in cooperation with Innowise Group has developed and implemented the mobile application for blockchain-driven document and data management. Our fruitful collaboration resulted in the creation of a digital product that is a quick and convenient tool for remote document exchange and data authenticity control.

Our customer was fully satisfied with Innowise Group team performance. We have developed the client side of the application, which has received rave reviews from both the end users of the application and the client. We continue to work closely with CoreLedger on other projects while planning to expand the functionality of the mobile application and working on updating the solution architecture.

In partnership with Innowise Group, CoreLedger has successfully designed and deployed a mobile app for managing documents and data through blockchain technology. This collaborative effort has yielded a digital solution that offers swift and user-friendly remote document sharing along with effective data validation.

The performance of Innowise Group's team in developing the client-side of the application garnered exceptional feedback from both end users and the client, resulting in complete customer satisfaction. We maintain a close working relationship with CoreLedger, collaborating on various other projects. Furthermore, we are actively involved in enhancing the mobile application's functionality and updating the solution architecture to meet evolving requirements.

rewrite the text using synonyms:
Our client is a multidepartmental bank with more than 80 digital products, including proprietary software, CRM systems, ERP systems, web portals, and mobile apps. 
Our client did not have a clear vision for software development from ideation to delivery, which hindered their ability to benefit from DevOps in the banking sector.

Our customer is a diverse bank with numerous departments, boasting a portfolio of over 80 digital solutions, encompassing proprietary applications, CRM platforms, ERP systems, web portals, and mobile applications.

However, the client faced challenges due to the absence of a well-defined software development roadmap, hindering their ability to fully exploit DevOps practices within the banking industry.

rewrite the text using synonyms: 
As our client did not have a clear vision for software development from ideation to delivery, they  could not benefit from DevOps in the banking sector and struggled with scattered knowledge and codebases, lacked testing automation, and faced longer time-to-market.

Due to the client's lack of a coherent software development strategy spanning from conception to deployment, they were unable to leverage the advantages of DevOps within the banking domain. Consequently, they encountered challenges such as fragmented expertise and codebases, absence of automated testing, and extended time-to-market for their solutions.

rewrite the text using synonyms:

Our client is a multi departmental bank with more than 80 digital products, including proprietary software, CRM systems, ERP systems, web portals, and mobile apps.

Our customer is a bank with various departments, boasting an extensive range of more than 80 digital offerings, comprising exclusive software, CRM platforms, ERP systems, web gateways, and mobile applications.
